generatedFrom: Microsoft Learn controls inventory and local component parity lab requirements

productionStateCoverage.interactionRequirement: invoke alternate command and assert status
productionStateCoverage.accessibilityRequirement: workbench navigation, selected row, command, and status names remain visible and non-private
knownGaps: Native Windows workbench coverage is present; macOS list/detail, command, and status chrome are not production-rendered yet.

productionStateCoverage.accessibilityRequirement: focused control exposes role, name, enabled state, and value where available
knownGaps: Native Windows focus coverage is present; macOS focus visuals are not production-rendered yet.
Native Windows disabled coverage is present; macOS disabled chrome is not production-rendered yet.

productionStateCoverage.accessibilityRequirement: checked controls expose checked state and name
knownGaps: Native Windows checked-state coverage is present; macOS check/radio glyphs are not production-rendered yet.

productionStateCoverage.accessibilityRequirement: text input exposes role, name, value, and focus state
knownGaps: Native Windows TextBox focus coverage is present; macOS caret and focus visuals are not production-rendered yet.

productionStateCoverage.accessibilityRequirement: validation message remains visible and is not color-only
knownGaps: Invalid state is represented with public text; native validation chrome is not production-rendered yet.

productionStateCoverage.interactionRequirement: select item and assert selected item
productionStateCoverage.accessibilityRequirement: selected list row exposes selected state and item name
knownGaps: Native Windows selected-row coverage is present; macOS row and selection chrome are not production-rendered yet.

productionStateCoverage.accessibilityRequirement: command exposes role, name, icon metadata, and enabled state
knownGaps: Native Windows command invocation coverage is present; macOS command chrome is not production-rendered yet.
Native Windows disabled command coverage is present; macOS disabled command chrome is not production-rendered yet.

productionStateCoverage.interactionRequirement: open menu or flyout, invoke item, dismiss
productionStateCoverage.accessibilityRequirement: popup/menu item names, expanded state, and accelerator text
knownGaps: Native Windows popup targets are visible; macOS popup host behavior is not implemented yet.

productionStateCoverage.interactionRequirement: open dialog or flyout, choose or dismiss
productionStateCoverage.accessibilityRequirement: dialog/flyout title, body, button names, and popup relationship
knownGaps: Native Windows dialog/flyout targets are represented; macOS dialog and popup host behavior is not implemented yet.

productionStateCoverage.accessibilityRequirement: loading status remains visible and non-color-only
knownGaps: Native Windows loading coverage is present; macOS InfoBar and ProgressRing chrome are not production-rendered yet.

productionStateCoverage.accessibilityRequirement: error status includes visible text and severity, not color alone
knownGaps: Native Windows error coverage is present; macOS InfoBar and ProgressBar chrome are not production-rendered yet.

productionStateCoverage.interactionRequirement: click completion command and assert success status
productionStateCoverage.accessibilityRequirement: success status includes visible text and severity, not color alone
knownGaps: Native Windows success coverage is present; macOS InfoBar and ProgressBar chrome are not production-rendered yet.
